item_descriptions.vaccine vial: A small amount of clear liquid moves inside when you shake the sealed vial.

rooms.name: Research Camp
rooms.description: A quiet camp beside the forest. Dr. Lin studies how organisms adapt when a strange fungus spreads through the valley.

rooms.name: Microscope Tent
rooms.description: Glass slides and a microscope sit on a clean table. A note asks you to compare bacteria with the unknown strain.

rooms.name: Vaccine Bench
rooms.description: Sealed vials rest beside a warning chart. The notes compare immune responses, respiration rates, and the metabolism of infected cells.

rooms.name: Fungus Grove
rooms.description: Pale mushrooms cover old roots. Some trees look weak, but others seem to live in symbiosis with the fungus.

rooms.name: Mimicry Trail
rooms.description: Harmless insects copy the colors of dangerous creatures. Dr. Lin's markers ask whether mimicry can prevent extinction.

enemies.name: Invasive Vine
enemies.description: A fast-growing vine wraps around the trail markers and crowds out smaller species.

quest_steps.title: Collect a fungus sample
quest_steps.objective: Go north to the Fungus Grove and collect the fungus sample.

quest_steps.title: Analyze the sample
quest_steps.objective: Bring the fungus sample to the Microscope Tent and use the microscope.

quest_steps.title: Clear the invasive vine
quest_steps.objective: Go to the Mimicry Trail and defeat the invasive vine.
